mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYSTEM_LOG ( USER_ID, METHOD_NAME, ARGUMENTS, ERROR_MESSAGE, EXECUTION_TIME ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{methodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arguments, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMessage, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{executionTime, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM SYSTEM_LOG WHERE CREATED_AT < SYSTIMESTAMP
- NUMTODSINTERVAL(#{days}, 'DAY')
- NUMTODSINTERVAL(#{minutes}, 'MINUTE')
